name: Security Shield
description: Blocks dangerous tool commands, detects secret leaks in tool output, and logs all tool activity for audit.

enforcement.label: Enforcement Mode
enforcement.help: block = prevent execution, warn = log warning but allow, off = disable

auditLog.label: Audit Log
auditLog.help: Enable audit logging of all tool calls to ~/.openclaw/security-audit.jsonl

leakDetection.label: Leak Detection
leakDetection.help: Scan tool output for API keys and secrets, redact before returning to LLM
